{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323190306BBC399A98541C92010D9"}"},"total":1147},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7395898197695316761","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"救命啊真的太上头了[舔屏]这个智商嘎嘎在线，看的让人真的太爽了，因为一点蛛丝马迹能联想到这么多真的是太厉害了，不禁有智商还有情绪稳定，真的很难不让人喜欢啊 啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊是还没更完吗？看不够啊[快哭了][快哭了] 这个我真的要好好标记一下，缺文了就过来读这个，救命真的太好看了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721994388,"group_id":"7382744782830832702","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"又是一个想当磕学家的一天🍿","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0gIGFiTjqkJNQK4ZGBBqkvrgy4ZtBCxc8kZ9O9iamed","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/54bc9d150d3144158cae371c3684518e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795779&x-signature=MhzwINhJClhjh%2FXNJxeaeFny4%2Bg%3D","user_id":"1398199870840573","user_name":"每天想沉浸在小说里"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1398199870840573","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1715517258,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7382744782830832702","book_info":{"abstract":"【新文已开，主页可见，求收藏求支持啦~】
一年前，HG战队辅助Sliver沈言金宣布退役，最后一场比赛战绩0/14/7，背着一身骂名落荒而逃。
一年后，冠军战队KW的首发名单改动，HG-Sliver改名KW-Sliver，重回赛场，沐浴无限荣光。
　　
一年前，沈言金追星失败，狼狈退役。结果在排位里遇上了自己肖想已久的男神，还被误认为是女孩子，加了好友。
将错就错，沈言金买了变声器，正儿八经地开始装女人欺骗男神的感情。
后来两人进了同一个队，娇滴滴的犀利辅助小女友变成了沉默寡言性格古怪的大男人。
训练赛后，段明月扣着沈言金的手腕，把人牢牢地压在了墙上。
“变声器，穿裙子，装女人和我聊骚？嗯？”男人声音低沉沙哑，“怎么不叫好哥哥了？”
沈言金低着头，脸红得几乎滴血：“……好……哥哥……”
1V1HE

ook_count":0,"read_duration":43655,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":12702},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7401531987947750169","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很可爱的两个人，情感很顺畅，回忆穿插的不错。
唯一有那么一点瑕疵，就是前期沈言金的自述，也就是内心外露有些多了。这应该是措辞运用和语言表达的偏向到致的，相较之下，后期段明月的心里活动就很OK，恰到好处，形象充实，饱满鲜活。双向奔赴的爱情是最唯美的。他们很好。
（当然，扭曲的爱，我很喜欢😍）
对于路小姐，嗯，人总是悲哀的呢……从追逐梦想，到被利欲腐蚀，人，不可避免的，从发着光，到扭曲阴暗，偏激。所以，失去本心是最可怕的，因为我不再是我。","text_exts":[{"e":115,"s":111,"text":"双向奔赴","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E5%A5%94%E8%B5%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774263786C92010D9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227401531987947750169%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227382744782830832702%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E5%A5%94%E8%B5%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723305780,"group_id":"7382744782830832702","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzB90Hj7McK8eJl7kq23WrJ2aZkEJZZmZp8HdTq5qxX5","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/74525bcaff60450b8433f16c8493fe60~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791049&x-signature=2bQGnzVeCIZroRdDUWe6nFnVSQA%3D","user_id":"1515580544791824","user_name":"亓凛月"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1515580544791824","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7382744782830832702","book_info":{"abstract":"【新文已开，主页可见，求收藏求支持啦~】
